FX.title: USD/JPY Target 155: AI Analytics Highlights Breakout Catalyst Amid Central Bank Divergence
tldr_points: China PMI beat fuels risk appetite
BOJ's dovish stance persists despite Tokyo inflation
RBA hawkish shift supports USD broader strength
FX.excerpt: AI Analytics projects USD/JPY breakout to 155 as Fed-BOJ divergence widens on solid China data and sticky price pressures.
FX.comment: AI Analytics projects breakout to 155.00 as Fed-BOJ yield gap widens on resilient China data and Tokyo inflation.

STOCKS.title: S&P 500 Downside Target 4,800: Oil Spike and AI Rotations Trigger Technical Breakdown
tldr_points: Brent crude at $115/barrel fuels inflation and rate hike fears
Rotation out of AI stocks undermines tech sector weighting
Price breakdown below MA20 confirms bearish momentum; RSI(14) negative
STOCKS.excerpt: Oil surge and AI sector rotation drive S&P 500 below key moving average; correction toward 4,800 imminent.
STOCKS.comment: Oil shock and AI rotation drive technical breakdown below MA20 toward 200-day SMA.

CRYPTO.title: BTC/USD Institutional Accumulation Surge: U.S. Mining Legislation Triggers Breakout Path to $72K
tldr_points: GOP 'Mined in America Act' formalizes strategic bitcoin reserve, boosting mining sector
Regulatory overhang lifts as SEC enforcement shifts reduce immediate litigation risks
Technical breakout above 20-MA confirms momentum with RSI at 62 supporting upside
CRYPTO.excerpt: Pro-mining U.S. policy and regulatory clarity drive BTC/USD bullish momentum, targeting $72,000 breakout.
CRYPTO.comment: Breakout above 20-MA confirmed with RSI momentum; U.S. policy shift provides fundamental catalyst.
